_comment: Tool registry for choose_tools.py. Tools = Claude Code built-ins + local scripts. Tags drive keyword matching.
_schema: { id, type, short, tags[], spawn_script?, when, note? }

Read.when: Read a specific file or section — prefer offset+limit over full read

Edit.short: Exact string replacement in existing files (<5 lines — use sed instead)
Edit.when: Modify an existing file — exact string match required

Write.short: Write or overwrite a file entirely
Write.when: Create a new file or fully rewrite — use Edit for partial changes

Bash.when: Shell commands, grep, find, git, python scripts — always pipe output filter

Agent.short: Spawn sub-agent for isolated Cycle or Explore tasks
Agent.when: ≥5 tool calls expected OR independent parallel sections — max depth 1

lookup_py.short: T0 oracle: file + symbol + session index search before any grep or Read
lookup_py.when: T0 — ALWAYS run before grep or Read — returns file+line+read_hint+keywords+sessions
lookup_py.note: High score = already exists — prevents duplicate scaffolding

symbol_indexer_py.short: Refresh line numbers in knowledge/index_variables.json after symbol changes
symbol_indexer_py.when: After any symbol rename, add, or delete — run to keep index accurate

session_indexer_py.when: After session close — update session search index

token_estimator_py.short: Estimate token count for a text string
token_estimator_py.when: Before large file reads or long operations — estimate cost first

compact_reset_py.short: Single-source token reset after /compact — recomputes CHAT/SESSION/LOOP in session_tokens.md + prints [compact-reset]
compact_reset_py.when: After /compact — wired into SessionStart:compact hook (auto) + C0 plain-text confirm (other providers). T-180.
compact_reset_py.note: Mirrors B1 CHAT formula (compact_size+sys_fixed) + consume-once session_reset=armed→consumed. Never crashes a hook (exit 0).

choose_tools_py.short: Keyword search across skill-manifest + tool-manifest — returns top-N matches
choose_tools_py.when: When intent is unclear — call before loading skill-manifest manually

backlink_analyzer.short: Compute topic-graph related[] links from topic overlap in index_files.json
backlink_analyzer.when: After adding/editing files in index_files.json — refreshes related[] based on shared topics

repo_scout.short: Clone or validate a git repo, enumerate files, detect language, output JSON metadata
repo_scout.when: Phase 1 of repo_researcher skill — before any Read or map steps

session_close.short: Write all 5 mandatory session-close files (session JSON, tokens, thread, handoff, indexer)
session_close.when: session_manager §3 Steps 1-5 — replaces manual file writes at session close

verify_runner.short: Parse Verify-N lines from mece_plan.md section and run each as bash command, reporting PASS/FAIL
verify_runner.when: Phase 3 [L4] VERIFY step — after Edit/Write, run section Verify-N automatically

learning_profile.short: Record post-task quiz results + analyze user proficiency (mastery, weak/strong, glossing depth) — the usage engine of the user-coach closed learning loop
learning_profile.when: user-coach at task close (record) + UserPromptSubmit hook every turn (analyze)

rule_indexer_py.short: Auto-generate cross-file rule map (rules_defined[]/rules_referenced[]) into index_files.json
rule_indexer_py.when: After harness rule edits — regenerate rule map; powers audit_engine §6 Scan D cache (T-182)
rule_indexer_py.note: Index is a CACHE only — harness files stay source of truth. Never hand-edit the two fields.

repo_map_check_py.short: REPO_MAP.md drift detector — flags top-level files/dirs added/removed vs the curated map; --append adds placeholder rows (never overwrites descriptions)
repo_map_check_py.when: Flagged at session Stop via index_reconcile.py; run --append manually to scaffold rows for newly-added files/dirs (T-185)
repo_map_check_py.note: Fail-safe: always exit 0. Detect+append only — curated per-file descriptions are never auto-overwritten (judgment-type, like the manifest checks).

index_reconcile_py.short: Session-close index drift net — flags files changed but not indexed + lists idempotent regenerators to run
index_reconcile_py.when: Auto at session Stop (wired in settings.json); manual --dry-run anytime to preview index drift (T-183)
index_reconcile_py.note: Fail-safe: always exit 0, never blocks session close. S3 adds guarded auto-run of regenerators.

code_graph_py.short: Tier-A code import-graph extractor — regex-parses import/from statements (py + ts/js) into hard file→file edges (imports[]/imported_by[]) in index_files.json, kept separate from semantic edges
code_graph_py.when: Auto at session Stop via index_reconcile.py when code files changed; manual --dry-run to preview edges (T-192). Tier-B AST call/type graph deferred until src/ has TS code.
code_graph_py.note: Deterministic: pure regex, no AI. Hash-locked (extracted_at_hash) → idempotent, internal edges only. Spec: knowledge/code_linkage_index.md.
